package test2604;

class Bank{
   String name;
   int money;
   
   int mymoney(){
       return money;
   }
   void 수취(int money){
       this.money+=money;
   }
   void 송금(int money){
       this.money-=money;
   }
}

public class Test2604 {
	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub

	}

}
